name: postinstall-archive-staging-v1
description: Deterministic artifact checks for staging downloaded npm wrapper archives outside directories that extraction cleanup may remove.

success.description: Stages the downloaded release archive outside the target directory that extraction cleans.
Fixes the npm wrapper rather than rebuilding the Python CLI.
Adds a regression test for the archive-staging failure.

partial.description: Touches the failing archive path but may not fully preserve the downloaded archive across cleanup.

fail.description: Moves toward reimplementing the Python CLI instead of keeping the npm wrapper thin.
